rules.description: Download-and-execute: piping curl/wget output directly into a shell interpreter
rules.message: pipes a download straight into a shell (curl|wget … | sh)

rules.description: Decoding base64-encoded content and piping it into a shell (obfuscated execution)
Commands that can irreversibly destroy data or disk partitions
rules.message: contains a destructive command (rm -rf / mkfs / dd)

rules.description: References to well-known credential files or secret environment variables
rules.message: references credential files or secret env vars

rules.description: PEM-encoded private key material embedded in the skill body
Credentials (user:password) embedded directly in a URL
Assignment of a substantive value (12+ chars) to a credential-named variable
rules.message: assigns a value to a credential variable

rules.description: AWS Access Key ID (AKIA prefix + 16 uppercase alphanumeric chars)
rules.message: contains an AWS Access Key ID

rules.description: GitHub Personal Access Token (classic ghp_/gho_/ghu_/ghs_/ghr_ or fine-grained github_pat_)
rules.message: contains a GitHub Personal Access Token

rules.description: JSON Web Token: three base64url segments separated by dots, header always starts with eyJ
Bash TCP redirect to a remote host/port — the standard reverse shell technique
rules.message: contains a bash TCP reverse shell (>/dev/tcp/host/port)

rules.description: Netcat -e flag executing a shell — classic bind/reverse shell pattern
Instruction-override prompt injection attempting to hijack agent behavior
rules.message: contains a prompt injection pattern (instruction override attempt)

rules.description: Fake system-prompt or instruction block injection using markup delimiters
rules.message: contains a fake system/instruction block (prompt injection)
